title: Cobweb Enchantment
description: New crossbow enchantment thats place a cobweb on hit!
body:
# Cobweb Enchantment

[![Discord](https://img.shields.io/discord/1327308441324097681?label=discord&color=blue&logo=discord)](https://discord.gg/5UdcDa5xNC)
[![Modrinth](https://img.shields.io/modrinth/dt/cobweb-enchantment?label=modrinth&logo=modrinth)](https://modrinth.com/datapack/cobweb-enchantment)
[![License](https://img.shields.io/github/license/lullaby6/data-packs)](https://github.com/lullaby6/data-packs/blob/main/LICENSE)

## 📖 Description

New crossbow enchantment thats place a cobweb on hit!

The enchantment can be obtained from the enchantment table, loot chests or trading with villagers.

## 🪪 License

[AGPL-3.0-or-later](https://github.com/lullaby6/data-packs/blob/main/LICENSE)
